title: Nursery Rhyme. DLVIII. Natural History.
content:
Bobbin-a-Bobbin bent his bow,
        And shot at a woodcock and kill'd a yowe:
        The yowe cried ba, and he ran away,
        But never came back 'till midsummer-day.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Unknown delivers a powerful performance in "Nursery Rhyme. DLVIII. Natural History."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
